20 using namespace ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::IXMPropertyExceptions;

25 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/

27 ArcGeoSim::IXMV4_1MeshReader::IXMV4_1MeshReader(Arcane::IIOMng *io_mng, Arcane::IParallelMng *parallel_mng,
28  Arcane::ITraceMng *trace_mng): IXMV4MeshReader(io_mng, parallel_mng,
29  trace_mng){
30 }
31 
32 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
33 
34 ArcGeoSim::IXMV4_1MeshReader::
35 ~IXMV4_1MeshReader()
36 {
37 }
38 
39 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
40 
41 Arcane::String
42 ArcGeoSim::IXMV4_1MeshReader::
43 loadMeshFile(IXMMeshFile mesh_file)
44 {
45  if(m_parallel_mng->commRank()==0)
46  {
47  // Get xml document from mesh file
48  m_xmldoc << mesh_file(m_io_mng,"ixm_v4_1.xsd",Arcane::ByteConstArrayView(strlen((const char*) ixm_v4_1_xsd), ixm_v4_1_xsd));
49 
50  // Go to event definition
51  Arcane::XmlNode rootNode = m_xmldoc->documentNode().child("ixm");
52 
53 
54  // Up to now only unstructured grid authorized by xsd
55  m_grid_type = "unstructured-grid";
56  Arcane::XmlNode gridRoot = rootNode.child(m_grid_type);
57 
58  // Check grid attributes
59 
60  String dimension = gridRoot.attrValue("dimension");
61  m_grid_dimension = dimension ;
62  m_parallel_mng->broadcastString(dimension,0) ;
63 
64  // Check version number
65  /*
66  ArcGeoSim::IXMMeshVersion mesh_version = mesh_file.version(m_io_mng,m_parallel_mng);
67  if (mesh_version != m_supported_version)
68  m_trace_mng->fatal() << Arcane::String::format("Cannot read {0} mesh file version. Supported mesh version is {1}.",
69  mesh_version.str(),m_supported_version.str());
70  */
71  m_events_data = gridRoot.children("event");
72 
73  // Check unicity of event names
74  std::set<String> event_names;
75  for(Integer iEvent=0;iEvent<m_events_data.size();++iEvent)
76  {
77  const String current_name = m_events_data[iEvent].attr("name").value();
78  const bool is_new_name = event_names.insert(current_name).second;
79  if (not is_new_name) m_trace_mng->error() << "Event name '" << current_name << "' is duplicated";
80  }
81  if ((Integer)event_names.size() != m_events_data.size())
82  m_trace_mng->fatal() << "Incorrect event definition: see errors above";
83 
84  m_mesh_data = gridRoot.child("mesh");
85  m_nb_events_data_size = m_events_data.size() ;
86  m_has_mesh_data = ! m_mesh_data.null() ;
87  SharedArray<Integer> buffer(2) ;
88  buffer[0] = m_has_mesh_data?1:0 ;
89  buffer[1] = m_nb_events_data_size ;
90  m_parallel_mng->broadcast(buffer,0) ;
91  }
92  else
93  {
94  String dimension ;
95  m_parallel_mng->broadcastString(dimension,0) ;
96  m_grid_dimension = dimension ;
97  SharedArray<Integer> buffer(2) ;
98  m_parallel_mng->broadcast(buffer,0) ;
99  m_has_mesh_data = buffer[0]!=0 ;
100  m_nb_events_data_size = buffer[1] ;
101  }
102 
103  m_mesh_file_directory_name = mesh_file.path();
104 
105  return m_mesh_file_directory_name;
106 }
107 
108 
109 void
110 ArcGeoSim::IXMV4_1MeshReader::
111 readCellData(ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::IXMCellData& cell_data, const ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::IXMMeshInfo& check_mesh_info)
112 {
113 
114  ARCANE_ASSERT((!m_mesh_data.null()),("No mesh file loaded in IXM V4 reader."))
115 
116  Arcane::XmlNode rootNode = m_mesh_data.child("topology");
117 
118  // Get managers
119  ItemTypeMng * typeMng = ItemTypeMng::singleton();
120  { // Handle created cells
121  _readCellInfos(rootNode.children("cells"),
122  "cells",
123  typeMng,
124  cell_data.item_ids,
125  cell_data.item_infos,
126  check_mesh_info);
127  }
128 }
129 
130 #ifdef USE_EVOLUTIF
131 void
132 ArcGeoSim::IXMV4_1MeshReader::
133 readCellIncrementData(ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::IXMCellIncrementData& cell_increment_data,const ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::IXMMeshInfo& check_mesh_info)
134 {
135  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_mesh_increment_xml_node),("No Mesh Increment loaded in the IXMV4MeshReader"))
136  ARCANE_ASSERT((_isTopologyIncrementLoaded()),("Topology Increment not loaded in the IXMV4MeshReader"))
137 
138  Arcane::XmlNode rootNode = *(m_mesh_increment_xml_node->topology_node.get());
139 
140  // Get managers
141  ItemTypeMng * typeMng = ItemTypeMng::singleton();
142 
143  { // Handle deleted cells
144  Arcane::XmlNodeList delete_cell_list = rootNode.children("delete-cells");
145  for (Arcane::XmlNodeList::const_iterator iCellList = delete_cell_list.begin();
146  iCellList != delete_cell_list.end(); ++iCellList)
147  { // Read delete-cells node
148  Arcane::Int64SharedArray cell_ids = IXMInt64DataNodeReader(iCellList->child("cell-ids"),
149  "Error while reading delete-cells uids",
150  m_mesh_file_directory_name).read();
151  cell_increment_data.removed_cell_data.item_ids.addRange(cell_ids);
152  }
153  }
154 
155  { // Handle created cells
156  _readCellInfos(rootNode.children("create-cells"),
157  "create-cells",
158  typeMng,
159  cell_increment_data.new_cell_data.item_ids,
160  cell_increment_data.new_cell_data.item_infos,
161  check_mesh_info);
162  }
163 
164  {// Handle modified cells
165  _readCellInfos(rootNode.children("change-cells"),
166  "change-cells",
167  typeMng,
168  cell_increment_data.changed_cell_data.item_ids,
169  cell_increment_data.changed_cell_data.item_infos,
170  check_mesh_info);
171  }
172 }
173 #endif
174 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
175 
176 void
177 ArcGeoSim::IXMV4_1MeshReader::
178 _readCellInfos(const Arcane::XmlNodeList& cell_list_node,
179  const String& block_name,
180  ItemTypeMng * typeMng,
181  Arcane::Int64Array & cell_uids,
182  Arcane::Int64Array & cell_infos,
183  const ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::IXMMeshInfo& check_mesh_info)
184 {
185 
186  Arcane::String error_types = Arcane::String::format("Error while reading {0} cell-types",block_name);
187  // Arcane::String error_hybrid_types = Arcane::String::format("Error while reading {0} hybrid-types",block_name);
188  Arcane::String error_ids = Arcane::String::format("Error while reading {0} cell-ids",block_name);
189  Arcane::String error_node_ids = Arcane::String::format("Error while reading {0} node-ids",block_name);
190 
191  for (Arcane::XmlNodeList::const_iterator iCellList = cell_list_node.begin();
192  iCellList != cell_list_node.end(); ++iCellList)
193  {
194  // Read each block of data (types, cell ids, cell node ids)
195  Arcane::IntegerSharedArray cell_type_ids = IXMIntegerDataNodeReader(iCellList->child("cell-types"),error_types, m_mesh_file_directory_name).read();
196 // Arcane::IntegerSharedArray cell_hybrids_type_ids = IXMIntegerDataNodeReader(iCellList->child("hybrids-types"),error_hybrid_types, m_mesh_file_directory_name).read();
197  Arcane::Int64SharedArray cell_ids = IXMInt64DataNodeReader(iCellList->child("cell-ids"),error_ids,m_mesh_file_directory_name).read();
198  Arcane::Int64SharedArray node_ids = IXMInt64DataNodeReader(iCellList->child("node-ids"),error_node_ids, m_mesh_file_directory_name).read();
199 
200  // Check sizes for cells types and id
201  if (cell_type_ids.size() != cell_ids.size())
202  m_trace_mng->fatal() << "Inconsistent number of cell types (" << cell_ids.size() << ") and cell ids (" << cell_type_ids.size() << ") in " << block_name << " block";
203 
204  const Arcane::Integer event_nb_new_cells = cell_type_ids.size();
205 
206  Arcane::Integer event_nb_new_nodes = 0;
207  // Parse types
208  Arcane::IntegerSharedArray cell_nb_nodes(event_nb_new_cells); // number of nodes for each cell
209  const Arcane::Integer mesh_dimension = check_mesh_info.dimension(); // dimension of current mesh
210  for (Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < event_nb_new_cells; ++i)
211  {
212  if(cell_type_ids[i]>=min_exotic_type_value){
213  //case of an hybrid cell
214 
215  const Integer user_cell_type = cell_type_ids[i]-min_exotic_type_value;
216  const Integer internal_cell_type = user_cell_type + ItemTypeMng::nbBuiltInItemType();
217  if (user_cell_type < 0 || internal_cell_type >= ItemTypeMng::nbBasicItemType())
218  m_trace_mng->fatal() << "Bad item type " << user_cell_type;
219  auto item_type = typeMng->typeFromId(internal_cell_type);
220  cell_type_ids[i]=internal_cell_type;
221  }
222  if (cell_type_ids[i] >= typeMng->nbBasicItemType())
223  m_trace_mng->fatal() << String::format("Type id {0} does not exist for arcane items.",cell_type_ids[i]);
224  if (check_mesh_info.typeDimension()[cell_type_ids[i]] != mesh_dimension)
225  m_trace_mng->fatal() << "Type id " << cell_type_ids[i] << " for cell is not allowed in " << mesh_dimension << "d mesh in <" << iCellList->xpathFullName() << ">";
226  // increment new node number
227  auto current_cell_type = typeMng->typeFromId(cell_type_ids[i]);
228  cell_nb_nodes[i] = current_cell_type->nbLocalNode();
229  event_nb_new_nodes += cell_nb_nodes[i];
230  }
231  // Check size for node id
232  if (node_ids.size() != event_nb_new_nodes)
233  m_trace_mng->fatal()
234  << "Inconsistent total node number not equal to cell number times cell node number. Total node number expected ="
235  << event_nb_new_nodes << " Total node number received = " << node_ids.size();
236  // Add cells info
237  cell_uids.addRange(cell_ids);
238  cell_infos.reserve(cell_infos.size() + 2*event_nb_new_cells + event_nb_new_nodes); // optimisation d'allocation
239  for (Arcane::Integer i = 0, current_node_position = 0; i < event_nb_new_cells; ++i)
240  {
241  cell_infos.add(cell_type_ids[i]);
242  cell_infos.add(cell_ids[i]);
243  cell_infos.addRange(node_ids.subConstView(current_node_position,cell_nb_nodes[i]));
244  current_node_position += cell_nb_nodes[i];
245  }
246  }
247 }
248 
249 #ifdef USE_EVOLUTIF
250 bool
251 ArcGeoSim::IXMV4_1MeshReader::
252 _isTopologyIncrementLoaded()
253 {
254  if (m_mesh_increment_xml_node) return static_cast<bool>(m_mesh_increment_xml_node->topology_node);
255  return false;
256 }
257 #endif
258
